task_id: 发布智谱联网搜索健康探针修复到生产

production_verification.zhipu_runtime_status: no longer falsely unavailable under transient failure semantics; probe logic now maps 429/request_failed to degraded
production_verification.frontend_gating_note: With the backend no longer returning unavailable for transient probe failures, frontend should no longer grey out GLM/Zhipu solely because of 429/request_failed.

remaining_risks: Provider-native probe still selects a single active zhipu text model as provider representative; if that model alone degrades, provider-level status may still be noisy.
No manual browser click-through was executed in this task; validation is based on deploy health plus production checkout/runtime contract verification.
summary: 已将智谱联网搜索健康探针修复提交并推送到 origin/master，完成生产部署。生产 checkout 已更新到 5770c759，并通过主站/后端健康检查；本次修复将旧版 chat/completions 探针切换为结构化 /web_search 探针，并把 429/request_failed 从 unavailable 下调为 degraded，避免前端整链路误置灰。
